# File Tree Explorer - Copilot Instructions

This workspace contains a Node.js web application for file tree exploration and markdown document management.

## Project Setup - COMPLETED

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Node.js file tree explorer with markdown support
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Express.js server with frontend interface created
- [x] Customize the Project - File management API and web interface implemented
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No specific extensions required
- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies defined in package.json
- [x] Create and Run Task - Development task configured
- [x] Launch the Project - Ready to run with `npm run dev`
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md and documentation created

## Project Structure

- **server.js** - Main Express application with file management API
- **public/** - Frontend files (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- **documents/** - User-created files and folders (file tree root)
- **package.json** - Project dependencies and configuration

## Key Features

- Visual file tree interface
- Create/edit/delete folders and markdown files
- Real-time markdown editing and preview
- Responsive web design
- File system persistence

## Getting Started

1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Start development server: `npm run dev`
3. Open browser to: http://localhost:3000
